name: @teaspill/chaos
description: Failure-injection suite (T9.1): the ACCEPTANCE TEST for D2/D3. For each of 5 faults, drive a conformance scenario, inject the fault mid-flight (docker compose kill/restart or a process handle), then re-assert the mapped D2/D3 invariant with the conformance kit's assert* fns — 'assert the invariant, not just no-crash'. Live faults gate on TEASPILL_CHAOS + TEASPILL_STACK_URL and skip in CI; offline invariant tests run in CI.
